title: General Forms Directory
content:
======================================================================
MORGAN STATE UNIVERSITY - STUDENT FORMS DIRECTORY
Complete list of forms with direct links
======================================================================

HOW TO ACCESS WEBSIS FORMS:
----------------------------------------
  1. Go to Student Self-Service/WebSIS at https://lbpsso.morgan.edu/cas/login
  2. Click 'Service Requests' from the menu
  3. Enter your Morgan State University email and click 'Continue'
  4. Do NOT click 'Sign in with Google', 'Microsoft', or 'Apple'
  5. Sign in with your MSU credentials on the landing page
  6. Launch the Dashboard to access forms

======================================================================
OFFICE OF THE REGISTRAR FORMS
======================================================================
Contact: 443-885-3300 | Tyler Hall

CURRENT STUDENT FORMS (Access via WebSIS):
--------------------------------------------------
  * Change of Major/Minor/Concentration Request
    Purpose: Request to change your major, minor, or concentration
    Tutorial: https://youtu.be/Qjl2h9Z6SGo?si=EuQ8pWY8cqa08f2Q
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

  * Change of Catalog Request
    Purpose: Request to change to a different academic catalog year
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

  * Excess Credit Request
    Purpose: Request to take more than 18 credits in a semester
    Tutorial: https://www.morgan.edu/office-of-the-registrar/priority-registration-time-ticket-groupings
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

  * Time Conflict Request
    Purpose: Request approval for courses with overlapping schedules (requires both instructors' approval)
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

  * Permission to Take Courses Off Campus
    Purpose: Request approval to take courses at another institution
    Tutorial: https://youtu.be/4LlY9yyD9o0
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

  * Withdrawal/Cancellation Request
    Purpose: Withdraw from courses or cancel enrollment
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

  * Enrollment Verification Request
    Purpose: Request official verification of your enrollment status
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

  * FERPA Release Form
    Purpose: Authorize release of educational records to specified individuals
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

  * Personal Information Update Request
    Purpose: Update legal name, date of birth, address, gender, or Social Security Number
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

  * Exception to Enrollment Policy Appeal
    Purpose: Appeal enrollment deadlines or policy exceptions
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service > Service Requests

FORMER STUDENT FORMS (Direct Links):
--------------------------------------------------
  * Enrollment/Degree Verification Request
    Purpose: Verify enrollment or degree for former students
    Link: https://app.smartsheet.com/b/form/6dac11c037f34bfa8687092d04f88f5b

  * Exception to Enrollment Policy Appeal
    Purpose: Appeal enrollment deadlines or policy exceptions
    Link: https://app.smartsheet.com/b/form/8d1182d85e3f4e2abb05ad8bffe9bde3

  * Personal Information Update Request
    Purpose: Update legal name, DOB, address, gender, SSN
    Link: https://app.smartsheet.com/b/form/beddfd4c3dbf4a2fa6a7c7da2d56d8da

TRANSCRIPTS AND DIPLOMAS:
--------------------------------------------------
  * Official Transcript Request
    Purpose: Order official transcripts to be sent to other institutions or employers
    Link: https://exchange.parchment.com/send/adds/index.php?main_page=login&s_id=Q5pVp1evsSONeku3

  * Unofficial Transcript
    Purpose: View or print your unofficial transcript
    Access: WebSIS Student Self-Service

  * Duplicate Diploma Request
    Purpose: Order a replacement diploma
    Link: https://www.parchment.com/u/registration/33356/institution

======================================================================
COMPUTER SCIENCE DEPARTMENT FORMS
======================================================================
Contact: Wendy Smith - Wendy.Smith@morgan.edu - (443) 885-3962

  * COSC Course Registration Override Request
    Purpose: Request override for prerequisite or enrollment restrictions
    Process: Contact your academic advisor to submit the request
    Note: Overrides are NOT guaranteed. The department chairperson's decision is final. Time-conflict overrides require approval from both instructors AND chairpersons.

  * COSC Internal Course Substitution Request
    Purpose: Request to substitute one course for another in your degree requirements
    Process: Contact your academic advisor to submit the request
    Note: Core courses CANNOT be substituted

  * COSC Advisor/Faculty Recommendation Request
    Purpose: Request a recommendation letter from a CS faculty member
    Process: Contact Ms. Wendy at Wendy.Smith@morgan.edu

  * COSC Action Conference Request
    Purpose: Request a meeting/conference with department leadership
    Process: Contact Ms. Wendy at Wendy.Smith@morgan.edu

  * Grade Appeal Form
    Purpose: Appeal a grade you received in a course
    Process: Contact Ms. Wendy Smith to obtain and submit the formal appeal form

======================================================================
SCMNS (School of Computer, Mathematical & Natural Sciences) FORMS
======================================================================
  * SCMNS Internship and Work Experience Form
    Purpose: Report internship or work experience to your academic advisors
    Link: https://www.morgan.edu/school-of-computer-mathematical-and-natural-sciences/students/scmns-advising/internship-form

  * SCMNS Academic Advising Form
    Purpose: Complete before meeting with your advisor - ensures proper advising and timely registration
    Link: https://www.morgan.edu/school-of-computer-mathematical-and-natural-sciences/students/scmns-advising/advising-form

  * SCMNS Academic Appeals Form
    Purpose: Appeal decisions made by department chairpersons in SCMNS
    Instructions PDF: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ACADEMIA/SCHOOLS/SCMNS/SCMNS%20Academic%20Appeals%20Process.pdf
    Appeals Form PDF: https://www.morgan.edu/Documents/ACADEMIA/SCHOOLS/SCMNS/SCMNS%20Academic%20Appeals%20Form.pdf
    C.A.R.E.S. Form: https://powerforms.docusign.net/95de2ecc-bb63-4e7d-9d77-30699f16b044?env=na2&acct=91e00bed-fb84-48ab-9c47-f3a2c0621225&accountId=91e00bed-fb84-48ab-9c47-f3a2c0621225

======================================================================
GRADUATE STUDENT FORMS
======================================================================
Contact: 443-885-3185 | gradapply@morgan.edu
Application Portal: https://morgan.elluciancrmrecruit.com/ApplyGRAD/Account/Login

  * Appeal / Grievance Form
    Purpose: Appeal grades or program-related matters to ensure fair treatment
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=44f0db56-00f6-46fd-9b4f-b1a949fb3493&env=na2&acct=91e00bed-fb84-48ab-9c47-f3a2c0621225&v=2

  * Extension of 5- or 7-Year Statute of Limitations
    Purpose: Request time extension if you haven't completed your degree within the allowed window
    Link: https://app.smartsheet.com/b/form/96386144d69e4be8ac1e6ea6a50fb5d9

  * Leave of Absence Request
    Purpose: Request temporary leave from the university
    Link: https://app.smartsheet.com/b/form/53574dd64462456bbe572311ce848eea

  * Program Withdrawal
    Purpose: Withdraw from your graduate program
    Link: https://app.smartsheet.com/b/form/cc9e8b3dcfc24d7ba02f11c2b356532e

  * Transfer of Credit Request
    Purpose: Transfer credits from another institution to Morgan State
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=44f0db56-00f6-46fd-9b4f-b1a949fb3493&env=na2&acct=91e00bed-fb84-48ab-9c47-f3a2c0621225&v=2

  * Graduate Student Request to Take Undergraduate Course
    Purpose: Request permission to take an undergraduate course (rare circumstances)
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=44f0db56-00f6-46fd-9b4f-b1a949fb3493&env=na2&acct=91e00bed-fb84-48ab-9c47-f3a2c0621225&v=2

  * Reinstatement of Past Course
    Purpose: Restore previously taken courses to your schedule
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=44f0db56-00f6-46fd-9b4f-b1a949fb3493&env=na2&acct=91e00bed-fb84-48ab-9c47-f3a2c0621225&v=2

======================================================================
FINANCIAL AID FORMS (2026-2027)
======================================================================
Contact: 443-885-3170 | finaid@morgan.edu
Location: Tyler Hall, Suite 206
FAFSA Link: https://studentaid.gov/h/apply-for-aid/fafsa
Morgan State School Code: 002083
Verification Portal: https://morganstate.verificationgateway.org

  * Verification (V1, V4, V5)
    Purpose: Federal verification of financial aid information
    Link: https://morganstate.verificationgateway.org

  * Documentation of Legal Dependent (LDEPEN)
    Purpose: Document dependents for financial aid purposes
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=c6bd4e86-f9dd-45cb-82e1-6390c7978ab2

  * Documentation of Independent Status (INDSTA)
    Purpose: Document independent student status
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=c699954d-9dae-40bc-8a33-b4c8f902a95f

  * Documentation of Citizenship (CITIZN)
    Purpose: Verify citizenship status for aid eligibility
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=72dec6b9-67d6-47fa-bc5e-2d62eccf3041

  * Satisfactory Academic Progress Appeal (APELF)
    Purpose: Appeal loss of financial aid due to SAP
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=8c16b208-62d8-4243-8123-648db63959e6

  * Unusual Enrollment History Appeal (UEH)
    Purpose: Appeal flagged enrollment history
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=d2b9cf9a-49f0-4369-9c71-5e1ae79f781d

  * Dependency Override Request (DEPRE)
    Purpose: Request to be considered independent from parents
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=05ba464f-7982-4ca7-9e25-3093651da5a5

  * Unaccompanied Homeless Youth (HOME1, HOME2, HOME3)
    Purpose: Document unaccompanied homeless youth status
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=f0b5a8dc-d9bd-45b2-a041-14a751288d53

  * Total and Permanent Disability Acknowledgement (TPD)
    Purpose: Acknowledge disability status for loan purposes
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=cfa3d8a5-ff6a-4ef5-b5cc-d66c2237f150

  * Credit Evaluation Form (AUDIT)
    Purpose: Request credit evaluation for financial aid
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=312127b3-e378-42fd-a27f-5c75f4345573

  * Title IV Authorization Form
    Purpose: Authorize use of Title IV funds
    Link: https://na2.docusign.net/Member/PowerFormSigning.aspx?PowerFormId=070bfe85-19ae-4295-9dd9-70ae30667a09

======================================================================
ADVISING FORMS
======================================================================
  * Academic Advising Hotline Form
    Purpose: Report advising concerns or request additional assistance
    Link: https://forms.gle/9Rt3PcGJ1deNVPuA9

  * Academic Advising Kudos Form
    Purpose: Recognize an outstanding academic advisor
    Link: https://forms.gle/Tbr9LGhLdq7mkuvz9

  * Peer B.E.A.R.S. Mentee Application
    Purpose: Apply to be matched with an upperclassman mentor (for freshmen)
    Link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeUo9sp1UdKXTzagrODOaj7ttVKySFTlQLAfqA-MxiP470keQ/closedform

======================================================================
STUDENT PORTALS AND ONLINE SYSTEMS
======================================================================
  * WebSIS (Student Self-Service Banner)
    Purpose: Register for classes, view grades, access financial aid records, manage personal information
    Link: https://lbpsso.morgan.edu/cas/login?TARGET=https://gateway.morgan.edu/casban.xml

  * DegreeWorks
    Purpose: Track degree progress, view completed/remaining requirements, plan courses
    Access: WebSIS > Student > Degree Works

  * Navigate360 (EAB)
    Purpose: Schedule advising appointments, access academic support resources
    Link: https://morgan.navigate.eab.com

  * Bear Essentials Student Portal
    Purpose: Student account access and self-service
    Link: https://morgan.studentesp.com

  * Parent Portal
    Purpose: Family access to student information (with student authorization)
    Link: https://morgan.campusesp.com

  * Canvas
    Purpose: Learning management system for courses
    Link: https://www.morgan.edu/canvas

  * Morgan Gateway
    Purpose: Central hub for all Morgan State online services
    Link: https://gateway.morgan.edu

  * ScholarshipUniverse
    Purpose: Find and apply for internal and external scholarships
    Link: https://morgan.scholarshipuniverse.com

======================================================================
TUTORING AND ACADEMIC SUPPORT
======================================================================
  * CASA (Center for Academic Success and Achievement)
    Purpose: General tutoring and academic support
    Appointments: https://morgan.navigate.eab.com/
    Email: tutoring@morgan.edu

  * Academic Enrichment Program (AEP)
    Purpose: Tutoring, living and learning communities, leadership development
    Appointments: https://aepatmsu.simplybook.me/v2/
    Email: aeptutor@morgan.edu

  * NetTutor (24/7 Online)
    Purpose: 24/7 online tutoring access

  * Writing Center
    Purpose: Writing assistance for all levels and disciplines
    Email: writingcenter@morgan.edu
